title: Monstrosteve
description: This mod adds a goofy boss mob.
body:
This mod adds a boss called "Monstrosteve", a goofy looking boss as the summary says. For now, the mob is working in progress, so there aren't much behaviors of it.

#
How the boss behaves:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/id6FmOSFiI4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

#

### Here're the all attacks of the mob currently:
### 
1. melee attack: Slams the ground with one of its arms, causing circular shockwave.
1. smash attack: Slams the ground using both of its arms, causing fan-shaped shockwave.

Will use various fire weapons in the future.

![Incoming attacks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48f71fd46c558dc6505ddaea45bdf61a0ce69c1c.gif)
